messages.content: 请帮我用较为学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文：当热点离黑洞较远的位置时，此时初级像的亮度远远大于次级像，其对亮心的贡献大于次级像，所以亮心运动主要表现出初级像的轨迹。

When the hotspot is located far away from the black hole, the brightness of the primary image is much higher than that of the secondary image. Its contribution to the bright core is greater than that of the secondary image, so the motion of the bright core primarily follows the trajectory of the primary image.
请帮我用较为学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文：在热点接近黑洞周围时，此时初级像与次级像大体上关于黑洞对称分布，且基本上亮度相同，所以表现为亮心在黑洞附近徘徊。

When the hotspot approaches the vicinity of the black hole, the primary and secondary images exhibit a roughly symmetric distribution around the black hole, and their brightness is generally similar. Therefore, it appears that the bright core lingers in the vicinity of the black hole.
请帮我用较为学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文：当热点离黑洞较远的位置时，此时初级像的亮度远远大于次级像，其对亮心的贡献大于次级像，所以亮心运动主要表现出初级像的轨迹。而不同的是，在热点接近黑洞周围时，此时初级像与次级像大体上关于黑洞对称分布，且基本上亮度相同，所以表现为亮心在黑洞附近徘徊。

When the hotspot is located far away from the black hole, the brightness of the primary image is significantly higher than that of the secondary image, resulting in a greater contribution to the bright core. Consequently, the motion of the bright core primarily follows the trajectory of the primary image. However, in contrast, when the hotspot approaches the vicinity of the black hole, the primary and secondary images exhibit a roughly symmetric distribution around the black hole, with similar brightness levels. As a result, it appears that the bright core hovers near the black hole.
请帮我用较为学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文：处于  Bounded orbits 的粒子运动轨迹表现为在两个径向拐点和角向拐点之间来回振荡.
The motion trajectory of particles in a bounded orbit is characterized by oscillations between two radial turning points and angular turning points.
请帮我用十分学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文：在右侧的图中，所获得的图像则较为不同。
In the figure on the right, the obtained image exhibits notable differences.
请帮我用十分学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文：表示像素\(\pa{i,j}\)的坐标。
请帮我用十分学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文：（x，y)表示像素(i,j)的坐标。
The coordinates (x, y) represent the coordinates of pixel (i, j).
请帮我用十分学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文:对于我们的模型和采取的方法
Regarding our model and the approach employed.
请帮我用十分学术的语言将下列内容从中文翻译为英文: 对于我们的模型和采取的方法,我们最终会得到
With regard to our model and the adopted methodology, we will ultimately obtain...
